title: C1-A opening convergence scripted paths (smoke fixture)

fixed_start_state.notes: Operator harness for opening-convergence capture alongside frontier_gate_long_session.json.

turns.player_prompt: Begin the campaign at the gate.
Step into the yard and take in the scene.
After the transition, orient to the new space.

branches.label: Multi-beat lane: campaign start, two scene moves, post-transition beat, resume cue, continuation (~14 turns)

turns.player_prompt: Begin the campaign at Cinderwatch Gate; establish arrival and pressure.
Move through the outer yard toward the notice board and census lines.
Take a beat to absorb crowd noise, ash on the cobbles, and posted orders.
Transition through the side passage into the inner ward.
Step into the inner ward; note torchlight, serjeants, and cordon tension.
After the transition, orient to the watch post and who holds the line.
Continue in the inner ward: ask the serjeant a direct question about patrols.
Listen for rumors about the missing patrol route beyond the gate.
Shift focus back toward the gate district and census choke points.
Return attention to the notice board and northwest crate lines.
Step out toward the main gate arch as crowds surge again.
Resume the investigation at the gate as if picking up a saved session.
Follow muddy prints carefully among the crates.
Close the beat: note how the watch tightens and what that implies next.
